title: styrax americanus var. laevis
intro: Styrax americanus var. laevis, also known as Smooth American Storax, is a plant species native to North America, characterized by its grayish-brown resinous bark. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and minor wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Styrax americanus var. laevis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing irritated skin. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, salves, and resins, which can be used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
